DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF XIAOYING ZOU'S MOTION TO AUGMENT PLAINTIFF EXPERT DESIGNATION TO INCLUDE NEW, NON-RETAINED TREATING DOCTOR AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED ON THE CONDITION THAT PLAINTIFF AGREE TO A CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL TO BE THE 1ST AVAILABLE TRIAL DATE AFTER NOVEMBER 15, 2012. DR. NEWKIRK'S DEPOSITION TO TAKE PLACE NO LATER THAN 21 DAYS FROM, TODAY. DEFENDANTS MAY AUGMENT THEIR EXPERT DESIGNATION BASED UPON RESULT OF DR. NEWKIRK'S DEPOSITION. PLAINTIFF MAY DEPOSE ANY NEW EXPERT DESIGNATED BY DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. PRO TEM JUDGE: ERNST HALPERIN CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF XIAOYING ZOU'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO WRITTEN DISCOVERY AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS GRANTED WITH RESPECT TO DEFENDANT'S ANSWERS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY 31, 32, 33, 34, 35, AND DEFENDANT'S ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES 16.5, 16.6, 16.7, 16.8, AND 17.1. DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE FURTHER CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 24, 2012. DENIED WITH RESPECT TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY 30, AND DENIED WITH RESPECT TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION NOS. 4, 5, 6, 14, 16, 17, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22 AND 23. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. PRO TEM JUDGE: ERNST HALPERIN CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GREGORY M. SHEFFER, TEL. NO. 388-0911 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. EDGAR W. HAWKYARD & ATTY. GENEVIEVE D. DONG OF THE LAW OFFICES OF CATHERINE WALSH, TEL. NO. (925)825-9500 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF XIAOYING ZOU'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery And For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED with respect to Defendant's answers to Special Interrogatory 31, 32, 33, 34, 35, and Defendant's answers to Form Interrogatories 16.5, 16.6, 16.7, 16.8, and 17.1. Defendant shall provide further code-compliant responses without objection no later than September 24, 2012. DENIED with respect to Special Interrogatory 30, and DENIED with respect to Requests for Admission Nos. 4, 5, 6, 14, 16, 17, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22 and 23. Request for sanctions is DENIED. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare form of order. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Augment Plaintiff Expert Designation To Include New, Non-Retained Treating Doctor And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. GREGORY M. SHEFFER, TEL. NO. 388-0911 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. EDGAR W. HAWKYARD & ATTY. GENEVIEVE D. DONG OF THE LAW OFFICES OF CATHERINE WALSH, TEL. NO. (925)825-9500 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF XIAOYING ZOU'S Motion To Augment Plaintiff Expert Designation To Include New, Non-Retained Treating Doctor And For Monetary Sanctions is
GRANTED on the condition that Plaintiff agree to a continuance of trial to be the 1st available trial date after November 15, 2012. Dr. Newkirk's deposition to take place no later than 21 days from, today. Defendants may augment their expert designation based upon result of Dr. Newkirk's deposition. Plaintiff may depose any new expert designated by defendants. Plaintiff's counsel to prepare form of order. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/JPT
